Interface IRasterStorageDef4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control raster storage properties.

[Guid("758E48CB-9568-4FD9-BC7C-F0697F76343E")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterStorageDef4 : IRasterStorageDef3, IRasterStorageDef2, IRasterStorageDef

A list of GDAL creation options as <Name>=<Value> strings.
